overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing an armored character exploring a futuristic general store with industrial green-yellow lighting. The character walks through the shop past display counters, storage containers, and weapon racks while NPCs populate the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic supply store entrance with service counter

agents.ego_description: walking into the shop and examining the front counter displays

notable_agents.action: masked patron standing near entrance wearing white mask and red jacket

entered.detail: large green overhead banner with white circular logo
glass display case with merchandise on metal frame
stacked cardboard boxes on metal desk

segments.scene_description: The character enters a futuristic supply store with green industrial lighting. A large green banner hangs overhead while glass display counters line the center. A masked NPC stands near the entrance as the character walks forward examining the front area.

scene_state.functional_zone: middle section with storage barrels and weapon displays

events.description: character turns slightly right to approach the main counter area

agents.ego_description: moving deeper into the shop past red storage containers and weapon racks

notable_agents.action: merchant sitting in chair behind the counter watching the character

entered.detail: large cylindrical red containers on metal shelving
stand with rifles and weapons on display
metal chair behind the service counter

segments.scene_description: Moving into the middle section, the character passes large red storage barrels on the left and a weapon display rack. The front signage is now behind while a seated merchant becomes visible at the back counter. The character turns slightly toward the merchant's position.

scene_state.functional_zone: back storage area with shelving units and exit door

events.description: character slows down approaching the back exit doorway

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back exit door past wall-mounted storage shelves

entered.detail: metal doorway with frame leading to back rooms
tall industrial shelving with small supply boxes
wall-mounted racks with ammunition and small items

segments.scene_description: In the back area of the shop, the character approaches a metal exit door while passing tall wall-mounted storage shelves. The merchant and front displays are now behind as the character slows down near the doorway, with ammo displays visible on the right wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic supply store, transitioning from the brightly lit entrance to the industrial depths of the back room. It begins as the character enters beneath a large green banner, moving past glass display counters and a masked NPC under green industrial lighting. As the camera pushes further into the middle section, the scene shifts past large red storage barrels and weapon racks, leaving the front signage behind while a seated merchant comes into view at a distant counter. The movement then carries the character toward the rear of the shop, passing tall wall-mounted storage shelves and ammo displays on the right. Finally, the camera slows as it approaches a metal exit door, leaving the merchant and the main storefront in the distance.
